deception_patterns.lie_type: Overemphasis on Human Irreplaceability vs. Rapid AI Evolution
contradictory_claims: AI tools are not net interpreters, maybe I think 1% for person in some cases 50% but not beyond that, but changing very fast, I think in two years, six months, maybe six months or two years would be maybe a fan, it will change the entire story (acknowledges rapid, transformative evolution of AI capabilities in near future).

even if let's say there is a tool which is 100% accurate, still I would say, go, put your hardware... understand the fundamentals... if you don't know, tools will generate a number of lines for you, and you understand what is in, you won't be able to... advise... solution of the problems (argues human fundamentals are irreplaceable for problem-solving and advising, even with perfect AI, implying a permanent ceiling on AI's autonomous problem-solving).
